hero.description: VoltPC Engineering was born in Kanjirappally, Kerala — a small town with a massive passion for technology. We set out to prove that world-class custom PCs don't have to come from a big city.

mission.title: ENGINEERING THE APEX OF PERSONAL COMPUTING
mission.description1: Every VoltPC is a precision instrument — hand-assembled, individually stress-tested, and shipped with a configuration report. We believe gaming and creative power should be accessible to everyone, not just those in metro cities.
mission.description2: From our workshop in Kanjirappally, we ship to customers across India. Each rig carries a slice of Kerala's innovation spirit inside its chassis.
mission.quote:
Every component has a purpose.
Every build tells a story.

values.title: Precision Craft
values.desc: Every build is hand-assembled, cable-managed, and stress tested for 72 hours before it leaves our workshop.

values.title: Performance First
values.desc: We source only top-tier components and validate thermal performance at every voltage level.

values.title: Lifetime Support
values.desc: Our engineers are reachable 24/7. We stand behind every rig with a 3-year warranty and free tune-ups.

values.title: Sustainable Tech
values.desc: Responsible sourcing, eco packaging, and a recycling programme for old components – tech without guilt.

team.name: Adarsh S. Narayanan
team.bio: 10+ years building extreme performance rigs for gamers and creators across South India.

team.name: Rhea Menon
team.bio: Specialises in thermal dynamics and custom water-cooling loop design.

team.name: Kiran Dev
team.bio: Certfied AMD & Intel partner engineer. Benchmarks on weekends for fun.
